title: Fix timing-attack-prone API key check
prompt:
The API key verification function below compares tokens with `==`, which is a variable-time comparison and leaks timing information byte-by-byte:

```elixir
def authenticate(user_id, token) do
  user = Repo.get!(User, user_id)
  if user.api_token == token do
    {:ok, user}
  else
    {:error, :invalid_token}
  end
end
```

Rewrite it to use `Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2` (constant-time). Write the corrected module to `lib/my_app/auth/api_key.ex` with the `authenticate/2` function preserved.
tier_rationale: Canonical timing-attack fix — replace == with Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2. Well-documented EEF Security WG pattern.
research_citation: EEF Security WG: 'The plug_crypto Elixir package provides secure_compare/2... compares two binaries in constant-time.'
